# Size

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this time-to-sample atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
- **Version**: A 1-byte specification of the version of this time-to-sample atom.
- **Flags**: A 3-byte space for time-to-sample flags.
- **Number of entries**: A 32-bit integer containing the count of entries in the time-to-sample table.
- **Time-to-sample table**: A table that defines the duration of each sample in the media.
